name: bind9-libs
title: bind9-libs
description:
Shared Libraries used by BIND 9
The Berkeley Internet Name Domain (BIND 9) implements an Internet domain
name server.  BIND 9 is the most widely-used name server software on the
Internet, and is supported by the Internet Software Consortium, www.isc.org.
.
This package contains a bundle of shared libraries used by BIND 9.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use bind9-libs because Shared Libraries used by BIND 9.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use bind9-libs as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair bind9-libs with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `bind9-libs --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
